description: This file defines a Python class `AuditsRepository` that manages MongoDB operations for audit logs, including index creation, creating audit records, and listing audits.

classes.name: AuditsRepository
classes.description: A repository class for performing MongoDB operations related to audit logs, inheriting from `BaseRepository`.

methods.name: col(self)
methods.description: Property that returns the MongoDB collection for audits.

methods.name: None ensure_indexes(self)
methods.description: Creates indexes on the 'created_at' and ('entity_type', 'entity_id') fields to optimize queries.

methods.name: None create( self, *, actor_user_id: ObjectId | None, action: str, entity_type: str, entity_id: ObjectId | None, detail: dict[str, Any], )
methods.description: Inserts a new audit log record into the collection with details about the actor, action, entity, and additional details.

methods.name: list[dict[str,Any]] list(self, limit: int = 200, offset: int = 0)
methods.description: Retrieves a list of audit records, sorted by creation date, with pagination support.

ctags.name: create
ctags.signature: ( self, *, actor_user_id: ObjectId | None, action: str, entity_type: str, entity_id: ObjectId | None, detail: dict[str, Any], )

ctags.name: list
ctags.pattern: /^    async def list(self, limit: int = 200, offset: int = 0) -> list[dict[str, Any]]:$/
